title: botrychium simplex var. typicum
intro: Botrychium simplex var. typicum, also known as the American grape fern, is a type of rare and endangered flowering plant that belongs to the Osmundaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, arthritis, and respiratory problems, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of the American grape fern include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, but it's essential to note that its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional or a qualified herbalist.
